label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's figure out this square dance problem. So there are five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. They start with partners: Alice with Helga, Bob with Jamie, Claire with Ophelia, Dave with Karl, and Eve with Rodrigo. Then there are a series of partner switches. I need to track each switch step by step to find out who Claire is dancing with at the end. The options are Helga, Jamie, Ophelia, Karl, or Rodrigo. First, I'll list out the initial pairings: - Alice ↔ Helga - Bob ↔ Jamie - Claire ↔ Ophelia - Dave ↔ Karl - Eve ↔ Rodrigo Now, let's go through each of the partner switches one by one. The first switch is Eve and Bob switching partners. So Eve's partner was Rodrigo, and Bob's was Jamie. After the switch, Eve will be with Jamie, and Bob will be with Rodrigo. Let me write that down after the first switch: - Alice ↔ Helga - Bob ↔ Rodrigo (from Eve's original partner) - Claire ↔ Ophelia - Dave ↔ Karl - Eve ↔ Jamie (from Bob's original partner) Second switch: Dave and Claire switch partners. Dave was with Karl, Claire was with Ophelia. So after this switch, Dave is with Ophelia, Claire is with Karl. Now the pairings are: - Alice ↔ Helga - Bob ↔ Rodrigo - Claire ↔ Karl - Dave ↔ Ophelia - Eve ↔ Jamie Third switch: Claire and Bob switch partners. Claire is currently with Karl, Bob is with Rodrigo. After this switch, Claire will have Rodrigo, and Bob will have Karl. So now: - Alice ↔ Helga - Bob ↔ Karl - Claire ↔ Rodrigo - Dave ↔ Ophelia - Eve ↔ Jamie Fourth switch: Dave and Alice switch partners. Dave is with Ophelia, Alice is with Helga. After switching, Dave will be with Helga, and Alice with Ophelia. Now the pairings: - Alice ↔ Ophelia - Bob ↔ Karl - Claire ↔ Rodrigo - Dave ↔ Helga - Eve ↔ Jamie Fifth and final switch: Claire and Eve switch partners. Claire is currently with Rodrigo, Eve is with Jamie. After switching, Claire will be with Jamie, and Eve with Rodrigo. So after this final switch: - Alice ↔ Ophelia - Bob ↔ Karl - Claire ↔ Jamie - Dave ↔ Helga - Eve ↔ Rodrigo Now the question is asking who Claire is dancing with at the end. According to this final arrangement, Claire is with Jamie. Checking the options, that's option B. Let me just double-check each step to make sure I didn't make any mistakes. First switch: Eve and Bob swap. So Eve (Rodrigo) now with Jamie, Bob (Jamie) with Rodrigo. Correct. Second switch: Dave (Karl) and Claire (Ophelia) swap. So Dave with Ophelia, Claire with Karl. Correct. Third switch: Claire (Karl) and Bob (Rodrigo) swap. Claire now has Rodrigo, Bob
